name: Pumpkin Pecan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, sift together flour, sugar, salt, baking soda, and spices.
3. Add beaten eggs, pumpkin, water, and oil; mix until well blended.
4. Stir in nuts and raisins or dates.
5. Pour the batter into greased two 9-inch pans, three 8-inch pans, or four 7-inch pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes, then reduce temperature to 325 degrees.
- Continue baking: 1 hour for 9-inch pans; 50 minutes for 8-inch pans; or 45 minutes for 7-inch pans.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pans before removing and serving.
